subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast clung to the Most Firm Handle that none can break! The spirit of the world hath been shaken and its foundations have trembled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تشبث بالعروه الوثقی التی لا انفصام لها قد اهتز روح العالم و تزلزل بنیان
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement
